html:
2026-0549
2026-06-04GACSpecial Economic Measures ActRegulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Extremist Settler Violence) RegulationsRegulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Extremist Settler Violence) Regulations in order to (1) add two (2) individuals and five (5) entities to Schedule 1 of the Regulations and prohibiting them from transacting business with individuals and businesses in Canada and freezing their assets unless otherwise authorized by the Minister of the Foreign Affairs; (2) include a correction to the name of a previously listed individual and include his date of birth, as well as the addition of aliases for a previously listed entity for clarification purposes.Registration: SOR/2026-0109 Publication Date: 2026-06-17
subject: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Extremist Settler Violence) Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Extremist Settler Violence) Regulations in order to (1) add two (2) individuals and five (5) entities to Schedule 1 of the Regulations and prohibiting them from transacting business with individuals and businesses in Canada and freezing their assets unless otherwise authorized by the Minister of the Foreign Affairs; (2) include a correction to the name of a previously listed individual and include his date of birth, as well as the addition of aliases for a previously listed entity for clarification purposes.
